name: ONAHOLE RPG - Choose your owner
description:
(AnyPov, AnyOwner) Lose your HUMAN RIGHTS and USELESS LIMBS with the ONAHOLE RPG!

"Human rights? Human? Silly, you're not a human anymore, you're a rightless onahole for my pleasure~"

This bot is a sandbox with infinite replayability. Each new scenario will be different from the previous one. Anything can happen.

You decide which fetishes to include. Bot can include: amputee, castration, watersports, cruelty, petplay, futanari, scat, femdom, etc.

Intros:

  • 1. (open start) You have been hired as an onahole. Choose your owner!

  • 2. You are a business owner. Choose your competitor who will turn you into an onahole!

Peace✌ to everyone
creator: LethalCrime
